title.en: Enhacing development with agent skills - Financial dashboard
title.es: Mejorando el desarrollo con skills de agentes - Dashboard financiero

description.en: Apply agent skills (accessibility, vercel-react-best-practices) to the existing financial dashboard, explore skills.sh via npx skills find, author a custom project skill under .skills/, and update the memory bank—without rebuilding the app from scratch.
description.es: Aplica skills de agente (accessibility, vercel-react-best-practices) al dashboard financiero existente, explora skills.sh con npx skills find, escribe una skill propia del proyecto en .skills/ y actualiza el memory bank—sin rehacer la app desde cero.

sharing.en: I just completed the Enhacing development with agent skills - Financial dashboard with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy: agent skills for a11y and Vercel/React, ecosystem discovery with npx skills find, and a custom .skills/ artifact. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-eng-financial-dashboard-skills-project #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #AgentSkills #Accessibility
sharing.es: Acabo de completar el Enhacing development with agent skills - Financial dashboard con LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy: skills de agente para a11y y Vercel/React, exploración del ecosistema con npx skills find y una skill propia en .skills/. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-eng-financial-dashboard-skills-project #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #AgentSkills #Accesibilidad

sharing.en: Scaled quality with composable agent skills on a real Next.js dashboard with @4GeeksAcademy. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-eng-financial-dashboard-skills-project #AIEngineering #skills.sh #4GeeksAcademy
sharing.es: Escalé calidad con skills de agente componibles en un dashboard Next.js real con @4GeeksAcademy. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/ai-eng-financial-dashboard-skills-project #AIEngineering #skills.sh #4GeeksAcademy
